prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **LS3 (6.2L V8, Gen IV, 430 HP)** from a Chevrolet Corvette C6, utilizing a **Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox** (6-speed) with a **Tilton twin-disc clutch** and **GForce G-1000 bellhousing** for Fiero-specific LS conversion. Custom **Hooker Blackheart 1 7/8" headers** with **3" stainless steel exhaust** routed through a **Borla Pro XS muffler** for optimal scavenging without drone.

Full **VAC Motorsports Stage 3 suspension kit** with **Bilstein B16 coilovers (8-position adjustable)**, **Hotchkis 1.25" sway bars (front/rear)**, and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** for subframe and control arms. **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers** with **13" slotted rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for aggressive braking.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm, 58lb/min) on a **custom-built Fiero-specific turbo manifold** (fabricated by **Turbonetics**), paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve**. **ID1000 injectors** with **AEM 320LPH fuel pump**, **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank**, and **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for standalone management. **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** and **Moroso 11-quart oil pan** for thermal stability.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Fiero widebody kit** (Pandem) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **duckbill rear wing** (both fabricated by **Seibon Carbon**). **VMR V710 17x9" wheels** (ET20) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (245/40/17 front, 275/40/17 rear) for aggressive stance and grip.

**Custom interior roll cage** (Mild Steel, 1.75" OD, 0.120" wall thickness) by **Autopower Industries**, wrapped in **Alcantara suede** with **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved). **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **AEM CD-7 dash display** for real-time telemetry.

**Full custom paint job** in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Squeeze"** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and rear quarter panels. **Anzo USA LED headlights** (H11 bulb swap) with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **custom C-shaped DRLs** (fabricated by **Diode Dynamics**). **Smoked taillights** with **V-LEDS 3157 bulbs** for a modern OEM+ look.
